series_metadata.series_description: This record contains documentation of medical/mental disability determination eligibility decisions. File includes, but is not limited to, decisions for approvals, denials, or referrals for Medicaid and Disability Assistance Programs. Form number (JFS) 3600 documents the decision. The Client Registry Information System-Enhanced (CRIS-E) tracks the determination decisions and informs the originating county of the case status.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Microform: master and duplicate film ; Paper: 60 days hard copy is prepped, scanned and indexed (imaged) and quality control iscompleted, and ; Electronic: in MIS on optical disk
retention_rules.disposition_method: Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
